description: Vennila exposes Vaanmathi, who tries to worship the deity but faces an obstacle.
To impress Devayani, Janavi stops the nuptial night. A few goons plan to abduct Mithra.
Bhagyalakshmi, a kind-hearted girl, gets married to Mithra, but her world shatters when he plans to abandon her for his lover. However, will Mithra’s guilt hold him back?

Mithra attacks Rajeshwari when she threatens to stop the wedding, but trembles to see Bharathi.
After losing her parents and hearing in a tragic accident, Isai is forced to marry Vishal when her aunt Rukmini manipulates her horoscope to meet Subadra’s strict astrological beliefs.
Apoorva tries to kill Lily, who comes to hospital to see Gagan, but fails.

episodeTitle: Bhoomi Refuses to Sell the Factory
description: Bhoomi senses an ill omen and refuses to sign the documents to sell the toy factory.

episodeTitle: Thenu Conceals the Truth From Tamil
description: After the wedding, Prabhu and Thenu visit Janakambal where Thenu conceals the truth from Tamil.
Veera and Kanmani lose their brother in a road accident caused by Maaran. What happens when a series of unfortunate events lead Veera to marry Maaran, and Kanmani decides to seek revenge?
